title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: YouTube video from AI Search channel surveying recent AI developments including OmniShotCut, Happy Horse, Mocap Anything v2, Recursive multi-agents, Vista4D, and model releases like SenseNova U1, Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, Claude connectors, Talkie, Grok 4.3, and Mistral 3.5. The content covers robotics, video generation, motion capture, language models, and agentic AI systems.
